commands.repair_reason: Protected maintainer label plus missing live proof for a security-sensitive Docker/CDP relay path makes this a maintainer review item, not a cleanup closure or automated repair lane.; Cleared: Static security review found no concrete new supply-chain or code-execution regression in the diff, but the security behavior still needs live proof. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a generated sandbox browser CDP relay token, authenticated bridge CDP URLs, an authenticated Python relay, stale-image/container contract checks, credential redaction, and focused regression tests.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction yet. Source inspection on current main shows the relay relies on source-range filtering, but there is no before/after Docker proof showing unauthorized CDP access before the patch and rejection after it.
commands.review_followup: Protected `maintainer` label plus missing live proof for a security-sensitive Docker/CDP relay path makes this a maintainer review item, not a cleanup closure or automated repair lane.
